strengths: 20 years of software engineering experience across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems significantly exceeds the 15-year minimum requirement
Demonstrated entrepreneurial initiative as founder and active maintainer of GISCollective (open-source geo-data platform) since 2016, plus founding and speaking at technical workshops
Broad technical depth with Staff-level roles, infrastructure expertise (Kubernetes, Docker, AWS CDK), and proven ability to work across multiple languages and domains
concerns: Zero demonstrated AI or machine learning expertise—no ML models, AI products, or AI-powered platforms mentioned anywhere in the resume, despite role requiring 'recognized expertise in AI with demonstrated products or platforms built with AI'
No Master's degree or PhD, especially not in AI-related field, which is a stated preferred qualification for the role
Career is primarily execution and implementation-focused; limited evidence of strategic product vision, market analysis, or customer advisory work required for director-level strategic role
response.justification: Bogdan is an experienced senior engineer with 20 years of software development and demonstrated leadership through founding GISCollective and organizing technical education. However, this role explicitly requires a Principal Engineer specialized in AI Strategy with 'recognized expertise in AI with demonstrated products or platforms built with AI.' The resume contains no evidence of AI/ML work, AI products, or strategic AI experience—only recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure tooling (MCP). While his general engineering credentials are strong, the complete absence of the core AI expertise required for this director-level AI strategy position represents a fundamental misalignment.
